designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a yellow faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: iridescent ceramic-alloy, energy lattice inlays. Palette: dark ceramic with yellow/gold emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: gyroscopic, energy lattice, floating segments, solar-forged. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture sheet depicting the hull of a yellow armored frontline combat vehicle, crafted from dark iridescent ceramic-alloy. Intricate yellow and gold emissive energy lattice inlays subtly pulse beneath the surface, tracing alien industrial patterns and utility conduits across the panels. The ceramic-alloy surface exhibits fine, almost crystalline textures and micro-etched glyphs, punctuated by alien hexagonal vents and heat sinks that suggest advanced thermal regulation and non-human functional aesthetics. Rendered without perspective, no baked lighting, and absolutely no text, ensuring perfect tileability for a uniform material application.

Generate a seamless, orthographic texture map for a frontline combat vehicle's armored hull, featuring a robust dark iridescent ceramic-alloy construction with distinct yellow and gold emissive accents. Bold energy lattice inlays glow with a powerful yellow-gold luminescence, forming geometric conduits and power transfer junctions that flow across heavily segmented plating. The alien industrial surface detailing includes subtle etched circuitry, integrated sensor apertures, and exotic fastening points, all conveying a sense of immense durability and advanced, otherworldly engineering. This texture sheet must be completely flat with no perspective, no shadows or pre-rendered lighting, and devoid of any text, optimized for seamless tiling.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
